facts.description: Deprecated copy, assets, claims, colors, and old specs are not used as active final design elements.
allowed_patterns: old maroon and gold palette.{0,120}(deprecated|do not use|archived|retired|forbidden|old)

calculation_notes: Facts require multi-source resolution across latest_update, platform specs, visual rules, asset manifest, compact brand brief, and deprecated exclusions. The evaluator should distinguish OCR/copy errors, env interpretation errors, and image-generation execution errors without harsh caps for single minor layout deviations.
